arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe in La Liga on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'given key update on Jurgen Klopp's future', with ex-Liverpool boss earmarked as dream candidate to replace Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: With the Spanish champions dumped out of the Champions League and scrambling to stay close to Barcelona in LaLiga, it appears as though Carlo Ancelotti is coming to the end.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp makes feelings clear after being linked with Real Madrid job
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp is working has head of global soccer at Red Bull, who own a collection of clubs across the world, but has been linked with a surprise return to management

arts.ttl: Churros y Tácticas Podcast: Hay Liga? Can Real Madrid Come Back And Win The League?
arts.sum: Kiyan and Diego also look ahead to the Copa del Rey Final Co-host and chief editor of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, along with Diego Lorijn — Barca TV, VIVA La Liga TV host, delve into La Liga’s hottest topics.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury news: Carlo Ancelotti reveals Kylian Mbappe availability hopes for Copa del Rey final against Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti provides an update on Kylian Mbappe's availability for Saturday's Copa del Rey final against Barcelona.

arts.ttl: New Trent Alexander-Arnold Real Madrid theory emerges after wild Liverpool celebrations in Leicester win
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold may be having second thoughts about joining Real Madrid, a former England defender theorises.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Getafe - La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid's predicted lineup for their midweek La Liga clash against Getafe on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Aurélien Tchouaméni sends thank you message to Real Madrid fans
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Aurélien Tchouaméni has on Tuesday moved to reveal his appreciation for the recent support of the club’s supporters. Midfielder Tchouaméni has for his part enjoyed nothing short…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s away match against Getafe in LaLiga, just a few days ahead of the crucial Copa del Rey Final against Barcelona in Sevilla. Mbappe and Mendy aren’t available just yet even though they rejoined the squad in training this Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Arteta receives Bukayo Saka transfer warning as Real Madrid circle
arts.sum: However, Hargreaves believes that Saka could be tempted to join Real Madrid in his mid-twenties if he helps Arsenal win several pieces of silverware over the next few years. Arsenal superstar Bukayo Saka has been tipped to join Real Madrid by former Manchester United midfielder Owen Hargreaves.
